map_npcs.name: Wandering Trainer
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: Elbows are best not thought about...

map_npcs.name: Wandering Trainer
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: Ok, but don't run away this time!

map_npcs.name: Wandering Trainer
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: Oh how nice, you came all the way here just to lose!

map_npcs.name: Wandering Trainer
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: Oh, hi there, fighty fighty time?

map_npcs.name: Wandering Trainer
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: Why have lunch when we can have battle?

map_npcs.name: Wandering Trainer
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: Oh yeah, it's all Oochin' together!

map_npcs.name: Wandering Trainer
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: Did you know that giraffes are, in fact, real animals?
